decks.author: wiza0
decks.notes:
9-1 from A to legend. The only loss was to me getting pizza, fucking up that turn, and then grossly miscounting my damage on the following one

AKA hitler patience, aka sequel to ⁠skt-bullshit-integ 

Hard mulligan for dunebud. Your ideal opener is dunebud + replica. 

If they don't answer it, you basically win vs anything board-centric but you may get cheesed — if you're really afraid of that your anti cheese options include playing a bag or tall miner to force them to respond, having 2 ice shocks in hand, or using frozen energy to strengthen your board (in order of preference).

If they do answer it, look for a 2g spell off your change of winds — if you find it, you can immediately retaliate with dunebud + 2g spell from hand + cost-reduced 1g spell from topdeck.

That's it. Keep your sweet little bundle of cancer all over the board until you get enough chip damage and gold to simply burn people with gemstones/shards. Don't be afraid of playing miner/bag for tempo but keep track of how many you have left (replica helps).

The biggest skill factors are ordering (which can get complicated here especially since this is a very APMy deck) and hand management. A lot of long-term hand management.

Cooler cooler is your flex slot. Replace it as you will. I chose this card bc it's a budget 4th dunebud (this deck REALLY wants dunebud tho) and if drawn on t2 as p2 vs zoo, with fenergy it can trade into a 1 atk monster and make them wish they played league of legends instead of this game.

Remember that 2-3-4 bags can also output huge damage and it is more gold efficient than miner if you have the spells for it. This will come up rarely, but it will come up.

You can actually run this with no DT. Vessel is not that strong here, though it helps.

decks.author: LuckySpin
decks.notes:
feast cage
66-13 (83% wr) in top ranks

hard mulligan for mauscage

play to maximize your chances of drawing mauscage (i.e. deckthin with snailmobile early)

do not spam 0/1 drops in some matchups where it's better to save them for a big feast play turns 3/4

do not greed mauswheel

beyond that it's pretty standard zoo, keep in mind your only burst is loox and rory, so constant board dominance is essential

decks.author: wiza0
decks.notes:
22-2 to top 1 on one acc and S on the other (30 min queue)

(33-3 actual record with all builds and ranks)

lost to shit starting hand which was fine bc i can play for evil plan nvm i topdeck skris on the turn i win if i draw anything but skris)))

i'm not happy with rein here but draw is worse and rein ensures you can live if skris is bottom 5

snoelle is here bc she is overstatted and can paralyze stuff like rk or chujin while also being good into zoo bc para + haste (that heals with kindness)

deck takes a lot of skill to pilot primarily bc of matchup knowledge and bc you need to account for what you will do if you topdeck X card. it's probably easy to mistake losses that are 100% your fault for losses to rng when using this

decks.author: LuckySpin
decks.notes:
ball justice
16-4 in S rank and above

mulligan away from undyne's spears, and mulligan for bomb, napstablook, diamond boy 2, and striped bird. other mulligan stuff is based on vibes

this deck wins by doing 30 damage to the opponent. this is true of every deck, but it's important to keep this in mind for this deck in particular
